Off Calendar May-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Wayne of The Armstrong Law Firm telephone number 415-928-1293 for Plaintiff Jennifer Krivanek.
Michael Wahlander of Seyfarth Shaw LLP telephone number 415-397-2823 for all Defendants.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Further Depostion Testimony From Defendant Alison Schwartz is granted in part and denied in part as stated on the record. Sanctions are denied as to everybody. The moving party is to prepare a form of order and comply with CRC 3.1312.
